description:
🕒 10:00–16:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Experience the first public showing of the 7000 series train, ride the traverser, enjoy a mini train (200 yen), try the driving simulator, see the 52-seat comfort display, visit food trucks, and relax in the open picnic area. Free admission. Rain or shine, but canceled in severe weather. Last entry at 3:00 PM.
location: 武蔵丘車両検修場 (日高市台462-1、西武池袋線「高麗駅」徒歩約15分)
summary: Seibu Train Festival 2026 at Musashi-Oka Vehicle Maintenance Yard
